title: ActionSpeed
description: A simple speedometer plugin for modern Minecraft that displays your speed in your Actionbar.
body:
# ActionSpeed: A simple speedometer plugin for Modern Minecraft

## Why does this plugin exist?

I have always wanted to be able to view my speed in Minecraft but I was distraught to see that I could only find speedometer plugins from 2014! So hence, this plugin was born a few days later

## What does this plugin do?

This plugin displays your speed in a multitude of different units (km/h, m/s, mph, kts) in your actionbar. This plugin also works while in vehicles such as Minecarts and Horses.

## How do I use it?

By default, the speedometer will be enabled when you log in.
Run /as help to see all of the available configuration.
 
READ THE DOCUMENTATION: https://github.com/Enderbyte-Programs/ActionSpeed/blob/main/documentation.md

If you have an issue...
Please report it in the comments immediately. Feedback is welcomed. If you have any feature requests, please put it in the comments as well!

If you are looking for older versions of this plugin (1.0 - 1.3), look on Curseforge under the same name





THIS PLUGIN NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT, etc, etc...
